meaning: adj.不歪的,不偏离的,坚定的,始终不渝的
examples: He was an unswerving empiricist with little time for theory.
One of the great things about our species is the unswerving desire to explore and discover.
His unswerving support for the Iraq war has alienated the swing voters who swooned over him in 2000.
Bishop Harries emerged from Friday's talks to reaffirm his "unswerving" support for Dr John.
The government needed to demonstrate an "unswerving commitment" to its low-carbon strategy, he added.
